error_reason: column name mismatch and positional data mismatch
gt_sql: SELECT T2.A2, COUNT(T1.client_id) FROM client AS T1 INNER JOIN district AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id WHERE T1.gender = 'F' GROUP BY T2.district_id, T2.A2 ORDER BY COUNT(T1.client_id) DESC LIMIT 9
pred_sql:
SELECT d.A2, COUNT(c.client_id) 
FROM client c
JOIN disp di ON c.client_id = di.client_id
JOIN account a ON di.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN district d ON a.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE c.gender = 'F'
GROUP BY d.A2
ORDER BY COUNT(c.client_id) DESC
LIMIT 9;
question: List the top nine districts, by descending order, from the highest to the lowest, the number of female account holders.
